hooks.command: IN=''; TTY=''; if [ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ]; then IN=$(tmux display -t "$TMUX_PANE" -p '#{window_active}#{pane_active}' 2>/dev/null); TTY=$(tmux display -t "$TMUX_PANE" -p '#{pane_tty}' 2>/dev/null); fi; if [ "$IN" = "11" ] && { ! command -v lsappinfo >/dev/null 2>&1 || lsappinfo info -only name "$(lsappinfo front)" 2>/dev/null | grep -qi kitty; }; then exit 0; fi; printf '\a' > "${TTY:-${SSH_TTY:-/dev/tty}}" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
